user.title: Austria Transit – Search Stop
user.description: Enter a stop name (e.g. "Linz Hauptbahnhof", "Simonystrasse", "Wien Westbahnhof").

pick_stop.title: Select Stop
pick_stop.description: Multiple stops found — please select the correct one.

data_description.line_filter: e.g. "3" or "REX" — leave empty for all lines
data_description.via_stop: Search for an intermediate stop — e.g. "Linz Hbf". The exact stop is looked up from the API.
data_description.direction_filter: Only if no via stop is set: e.g. "Traun"
data_description.max_departures: How many upcoming departures to create as sensors (1–10)
data_description.scan_interval: How often data is refreshed (default 300 s, minimum 30 s)

pick_via_stop.title: Select Via Stop
pick_via_stop.description: Multiple stops found for "{via_query}" — please select the correct one.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Austria Transit API
error.no_stops_found: No stops found for that search term

abort.already_configured: This stop and direction combination is already configured

data_description.line_filter: e.g. "3" or "REX" — leave empty for all lines
data_description.via_stop: Shown as the last resolved stop name. Change to search again, clear to remove.
data_description.direction_filter: Only if no via stop is set

pick_via_stop.title: Select Via Stop
pick_via_stop.description: Multiple stops found — please select the correct one.
